notes: Solid snake implementation with input queue, speed scaling, and audio; minor issue is the orthogonality check uses lastProcessedDir.dy===0 for horizontal moves which could allow same-direction inputs in edge cases, but overall plays correctly with no crashes.
An absolutely flawless implementation of Snake with input queueing, perfect collision logic, scaling difficulty, and even synthesized sound effects.

Solid basic Snake with working growth, collisions, restart, and responsive arrow/WASD input, but presentation is plain and food spawning can theoretically fail in edge cases without handling a full board.
